meta.title: Senator Lindsey Graham on Lessons from the Syrian War and the Need for U.S. Leadership
meta.description: U.S. Senator Lindsey Graham spoke at the Hudson Institute on the lessons learned after five years of civil war in Syria and the need for U.S. leadership in the region.
